modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to sign into equipment checkout laptop due to lock screen.

full_description_text: User can't log in. Another account is active on the laptop. The screen is locked, preventing username entry. This is happening on both Windows and MacOS systems.
short_description: Unable to sign into equipment checkout laptop due to lock screen.
description: User can't log in. Another account is active on the laptop. The screen is locked, preventing username entry. This is happening on both Windows and MacOS systems.
